patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/473

Fold a light verification pass into `pm install` output (activation status, registered commands/item types, health verdict) so agents skip the follow-up `pm package doctor` in the happy path. Builds on the multi-target install aggregation shipped for pm-hj9h (per-target success/failure rows).
GH-473: pm install prints a post-install verification summary

Dogfood GH-473: after pm install <package>, agents must run pm package doctor to confirm the install worked; a brief inline verification summary saves an invocation. Duplicate check: searched post-install verification summary — pm-b3e9 covers PRE-install owning-package hints; no overlap.

pm install output ends with a verification summary (activation status, registered commands/types, health ok/degraded) equivalent to a light package-doctor pass; failures keep the existing per-target failure rows; covered by specs

author: claude-code-agent
message: Release claim after documenting current bundle progress; not closing unresolved scope.
